titleStmt.title: SII 38.374: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 374. (A.R. No. 374 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Achyutayyadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1454, Vikṛiti, Paṅguni śu. 11. Monday = irregular.

summary.p: This inscription records the dedication of certain shepherds, belonging to Śeṟṟuppaṭṭu as tiruviḷakkukuḍi of the Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār temple at Dēvākkapuram, a dēvasthānam in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam, (a subdivision) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Koṇḍama-nāyakkar the father-in-law of Mallayapa-nāyakkar, a aḍaippattu (official). The shepherds were to measure out two kalam, one tūṇi and one padakku of ghee for burning lamps for the merit of the reigning king Achyutadēva Mahārāya. It is also mentioned that he dedicated their services after obtaining the consent of Kāḷattīśuranāyakkar, who was governing Paḍaivīḍu-sīrmai.
The temple accountant Uttaṇḍi, son of Appar, wrote this deed on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śusastiśrīRead śubhamastu svastiśrī maṉmakāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuva
śrīvirappiṟatāpa naracar nāyakkar Uṭaiyar kumārar Acci(ā)tatevamakā Irāyar
piṟutiviirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟta 1000 4 100 5 10 4 mel cellā niṉṟa
vikiṟutivaruṣattu pūṟuvapakṣattu paṅkuṉimātattu Ekāteciyum peṟṟa comavārattu
nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu melkuṉṟa
nāṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastāṉu tevakkāpuramvuṭaiyār tirumalar Uṭaiyanāyiṉār
tirukkoyilukku tiruviḷakkukuṭi Āka AccintatevamakāyirāyaṟkuRead makārāyaṟku taṉmam Āka kāḷatticura
nāyakkaṟku paṭaiviṭṭuccirmai cellukaiyil Ivar kaiyil Aṭaippattu mallayapa
nāyakkar māmaṉār koṇṭamanāyakkar vāṅki viṭṭa ceṟṟupaṭṭu maṉṟāṭi vella
cceri nallam piṉṉāṇṭi Uḷḷiṭṭārum vempilmāru Uḷḷiṭṭārum kaṟuttaccevvaṉum polum naṉṉāṇṭi
kārakap piṉṉāṇṭi cevvaṉum kūṉaṉcevvaṉēṟaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum poṟuceṭṭi
makaṉpettaṉum cantu man makaṉa peṟaṉum tarukkaṉpettaṉum tiritta Eṟu makaṉ
pettaṉ vempaciṇa makama maṇamum makaṉ Opacintaṇa nāyakkar makaṉ cintaṇaṉ
Uḷḷiṭṭār Āka Ivvaṉaivarum varuṣam 1kku Aḷakku Ita � kaṇṇaṉūr maṉṟāṭi vaiyaṇaṉ koṭun poṉṉum pe
makaṉ kākkaṇaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār varuṣam mā 1 kku Aḷakku neyi Āka varuṣam 1 kku Aḷakku neyi cūlakkālile
neyi 2 10 1 Inta neyi Irukalane tūṇippatakku kantāyap piṟāttiyile tirukkoyilukku
cantirādhittavaraiyum Aḷakkakaṭaivarkaḷ Ākavum Intataṉmattukku yātoruvar Akutam
paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokak
kaṭaivarkaḷ Ākavum Ippaṭikku Intak kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku
Eṭṭiappar makaṉ Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 38.374 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
